title: Santa Claus Dimension
description: A Forge mod that adds a new Dimension. Explore the Santa Claus Dimension and find gifts!
body: Santa Claus Dimension - This mod adds a new dimension with a snowy Christmas theme. It has trees made of candy canes and wooden cabins where you can find the one and only Santa Claus!! Dimension - You can find snowy villages, Santa cabins and candy canes trees in this dimension. You can find a new ore called Gift Ore used to get the Gift item. The dimension is covered with snow and andesite as stone. Santa Claus - Santa Claus is an entity which can only be found in the Santa cabin in the Santa Dimension. - He trades Gift Ore for a Gift by right clicking him with Gift Ore. Gift Ore - Gift Ore is an ore which you can only find in the Santa Dimension. Mine it with anything! Gift - This Gift item can only be obtained through Santa. - When right clicked it gives you random valuables including Netherite, Diamonds and even End Portal and Fireplace. Fireplace - The Fireplace is a block which when you step on it, it takes you to the Santa Dimension. Candy Cane - This mod adds Candy Canes and Candy Cane Block. The Candy Cane Block can only be obtained in the trees in the Santa Dimension or by opening gifts. - To get Candy Canes "uncraft" the Candy Cane Block. - You can eat these Candy Canes or craft them back to a block. Christmas Leaves - This mod adds Christmas Leaves which are oak leaves with Christmas Balls. They can only be obtained with a hoe in the Santa Dimension or by opening Gifts. Santa Cabin - This is a structure that only spawns in the Santa Dimension. This is also the only place to find Santa Claus and get Gifts! Gift Box - The Gift Box is an entity that only spawns in the Santa Dimension. When killed, it drops one Gift Ore. This mod is still under development and will be getting constant updates from now on. Enjoy! If you have any questions or suggestions please feel free to join my mods server: https://discord.gg/s7xYjBWDu4 Made by RoCris
